Emerson Royal on the Verge of AC Milan Exit: Agent Expected in Italy
arts.sum: AC Milan's Emerson Royal appears to be on the brink of departure from the club, with his agent expected to arrive in Italy to finalize the details of a potential transfer. Calciomerato report that the Brazilian right-back, who joined Milan last summer, is likely to leave before the end of the January transfer window, which closes on February 3rd. The post Emerson Royal on the Verge of AC Milan Exit: Agent Expected in Italy appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: AC Milan agree loan deal to sign Kyle Walker
arts.sum: AC Milan have agreed deal to sign Kyle Walker on loan from Manchester City. Pep Guardiola confirmed earlier this month that Walker had expressed a desire to leave City in the January transfer window. The 34-year-old informed the head coach that he wanted a new challenge after seven-and-a-half decorated seasons at the Etihad. 🚨🔴⚫️ AC […] The post AC Milan agree loan deal to sign Kyle Walker first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Roma Aim to Secure Saelemaekers Permanently, Milan Hold Firm on Price
arts.sum: Roma are determined to secure Alexis Saelemaekers on a permanent basis following his impressive performances since joining the club. The Giallorossi are planning direct contact with the Belgian player's agent in the coming days to discuss the potential transfer. The post Roma Aim to Secure Saelemaekers Permanently, Milan Hold Firm on Price appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ready to sell Joao Felix to AC Milan
arts.sum: New Milan manager Sergio Conceicao knows Felix well from Portuguese and also believes that he is well suited to playing in a front two. Chelsea have decided to sell Joao Felix in January if they receive the right offer, according to Ben Jacobs.
